infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IoT Sensor Hub uses your location as a sensor data source for streaming.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IoT Sensor Hub uses the camera for on-demand image and video capture.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: IoT Sensor Hub uses the microphone for video recording.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: IoT Sensor Hub reads motion sensors (accelerometer, gyroscope) for IoT data streaming.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow IoT Sensor Hub to access your camera for on-demand capture.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow IoT Sensor Hub to access your microphone for video capture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow IoT Sensor Hub to use your location as a sensor data source.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow IoT Sensor Hub to save captured images.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow IoT Sensor Hub to save photos.
